Gigabit Fiber Internet
Building-wide high-speed Wi-Fi and in-unit fiber. Every Zoom call, every stream, zero buffering.

Smart Home Tech
Keyless entry, smart thermostats, app-controlled lighting. Your apartment works as hard as you do.
💼
Co-Working Lounge
Dedicated desks, private call booths, and espresso on tap. WFH without the WFH chaos.
🏘
Rooftop Terrace
NYC skyline views, outdoor seating, grill. The kind of rooftop you actually post about.

No NYC Income Tax
Live in NJ, work in NYC. Keep an extra $3K–$7K a year. That’s a festival lineup, covered.

🗺 Your Neighborhood

Life in the Ironbound

Newark’s most vibrant neighborhood — authentic Portuguese culture, world-class dining, riverside parks, and 20 minutes from Manhattan.

🇵🇹
Little Portugal
Over 50% of Ironbound residents are of Portuguese descent — making it one of the largest Portuguese communities in the US. Ferry Street is lined with authentic bakeries, restaurants, and cultural shops.
🎉
Portugal Day Festival
Every June, Ferry Street shuts down for Newark’s biggest block party — grilled sardines, live music, parades, and accordion music. The neighborhood’s Super Bowl.
🏗
Neighborhood on the Rise
Ironbound is one of NJ’s fastest-growing neighborhoods, with new luxury developments, revitalized parks, and a booming restaurant scene — while still holding its old-world charm.
🌎
Most Diverse ZIP Code
The 07105 ZIP code is one of the most ethnically diverse in New Jersey — Portuguese, Brazilian, Spanish, Latin American, and more cultures all coexist on the same block.
🍽 Restaurants
🦜 Newark Legend · 0.3 mi
Seabra’s Marisqueira
Newark’s most iconic seafood restaurant — legendary grilled octopus, massive seafood platters, and sangria pitchers. Open 30+ years.
🥞 Fine Dining · 0.5 mi
Fornos of Spain
Upscale Spanish dining with authentic paellas, rare wines, and an atmosphere that feels like a passport stamp. A Ferry Street institution.
🥘 Tapas · 0.4 mi
Casa d’Paco Tapas Bar
Trendy yet authentic Galician tapas and Pulpo a Feira in a stylish setting. Locals swear by the small plates and the vibe.
🍝 Local Fave · 0.8 mi
Dickie Dee’s Pizza
Newark’s beloved old-school pizza spot — thin-crust, perfectly charred, no-frills perfection. A neighborhood staple for decades.
Ready to Call Ironbound Home?
Resipointe puts you at the center of it all
